# Practice Direction 34D – Form Relating to Part 34

See also Part 34 , Practice Direction 34A , Practice Direction 34B , Practice Direction 34C , Practice Direction 34E


### 1.


The form referred to in rule 34.28ZJ is –


Form of Notice – Download Notice under section 35(3) of the Maintenance Orders (Reciprocal Enforcement) Act 1972 PDF (PDF opens in new window) (PDF, 74 KB)


Updated: Monday, 30 January 2017
